subject: pnpm workflow version pinning
fact: If a repository already pins pnpm in package.json via the packageManager field, GitHub Actions workflows using pnpm/action-setup@v4 should omit the action's version input and let packageManager be the single source of truth.
reason: Prevents ERR_PNPM_BAD_PM_VERSION / multiple-version errors when pnpm/action-setup compares its version input against the repository pin.
